mapper.select:
SELECT p.player_id AS playerId, p.name AS name, p.position AS position, ap.current_team_id AS currentTeamId, t.team_name AS teamName, CASE WHEN ap.player_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Active' WHEN rp.player_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Retired' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS status, COUNT(pgs.game_id) AS gamesPlayed, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(pgs.points), 0), 2) AS avgPoints FROM Player p LEFT JOIN ActivePlayer ap ON ap.player_id = p.player_id LEFT JOIN RetiredPlayer rp ON rp.player_id = p.player_id LEFT JOIN Team t ON t.team_id = ap.current_team_id LEFT JOIN PlayerGameStats pgs ON pgs.player_id = p.player_id
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{playerName}, '%')
AND ap.current_team_id = #{teamId}
AND p.position = #{position}
AND ap.player_id IS NOT NULL
AND rp.player_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.name, p.position, ap.current_team_id, t.team_name, ap.player_id, rp.player_id ORDER BY COALESCE(t.team_name, 'ZZZ'), p.name LIMIT 300
SELECT team_id AS teamId, team_name AS teamName FROM Team ORDER BY team_name

SELECT g.game_id AS gameId, g.game_date AS gameDate, pgs.points AS points, pgs.rebounds AS rebounds, pgs.assists AS assists, pgs.steals AS steals, pgs.blocks AS blocks FROM PlayerGameStats pgs JOIN Game g ON g.game_id = pgs.game_id WHERE pgs.player_id = #{playerId} ORDER BY g.game_date ASC
